pull_request.title: Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates: | Package | From | To | | --- | --- | --- | | [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.71.0` | `8.72.1` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.25.0` | `3.26.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.25.0` | `3.26.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.25.0` | `2.26.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.5.2` | `0.6.0` | | [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.27.1` | `6.28.0` | Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.71.0 to 8.72.1
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

v8.72.1

What's Changed

  • Fix loading of YAML recipes on Windows by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#6575

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.0...v8.72.1

8.72.0

What's Changed

  • Drop still unused UnsafeReplaceJavaType added in d29ac92 by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6494
  • UUID generation fallback for Node version pre-14.17.0 by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6495
  • Changing AddDependencyVisitor so it is able to broaden the scope of a direct dependency if needed by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6434
  • Add style parameter to OrderImports. by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6496
  • Drop Lombok hint from RemoveUnusedImports class by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6500
  • In yaml CopyValue, invoke UnfoldProperties after MergeYaml by @​dsgrieve in openrewrite/rewrite#6499
  • Altering check for AddDependency to compare versions differently when direct vs indirect dependency. by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6505
  • Changing the parsing of the relativePath for parent in the MavenPomDownloader to prevent the situation where / was producing /\pom.xml on Windows rather than \pom.xml by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6506
  • Retain nested class imports in ChangePackage by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6515
  • Use var for variables initialized with type casts by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6523
  • Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6521
  • Fix KotlinTemplate building for annotations by @​Laurens-W in openrewrite/rewrite#6522
  • Handle JavaLanguageVersion.of(JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8.majorVersion) by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6524
  • Add XML recipe ChangeTagAttributeKey by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6525
  • Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6530
  • Fix HCL parser for comments with CR-only line endings by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6532
  • Update version defined in the gradle.properties referenced by the Spring Dependency Management plugin by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6527
  • ChangeParentPom propagate maven model updates to submodules by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6536
  • Process exclusion with ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId by @​gliptak in openrewrite/rewrite#5746
  • Java 25: Compact source files by @​Laurens-W in openrewrite/rewrite#6011
  • Fix StackOverflowError in JavaTypeVisitor for circular type references by @​mcebanupgrade in openrewrite/rewrite#6492
  • Adjust Java.Class inheritance hierarchy for ChangePackage and ChangeType by @​BoykoAlex in openrewrite/rewrite#6498
  • Retain imported annotations on package-info.java by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6519
  • Skip managed dependency check for plugin dependencies by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6534
  • Groovy - Fixing parsing of assert : syntax by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6531
  • Add Kotlin DSL support to RemovePluginVisitor by @​div-bargali in openrewrite/rewrite#6537
  • RPC - Don't close process.getInputStream() on failure by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6541
  • Revert "RPC - Don't close process.getInputStream() on failure" by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6542
  • Python: Refactor RPC receiver and fix marker serialization by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6538
  • Python: Replace cursor-based tracking with token-based tracking by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6545
  • Support for directives in Yaml by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6529
  • HCL - indentation for tuples continuation in autoformatting by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6548
  • Groovy - support for @Canonical annotation by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6550
  • Python: Fix various parser issues by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6547
  • Fix dependency management logic resolution order by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#6554
  • Remove artifact that is not published from the rewrite-bom by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#6558
  • Python: Handle PrepareRecipe, Visit, and Generate by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6551
  • Python: Remove Location enums by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6553
  • Groovy - support for @Synchronized annotation by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6562
  • Small renames and changing bom to pom in tests by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6565
  • Maven's DependencyInsight should use LinkedHashMap for stable order by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6568

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 71dc07b Fix loading of YAML recipes on Windows (#6575)
  • 532ff36 Fix flaky test by isolating tests that modify user.home (#6574)
  • 93642f6 Fix JavaTemplate replacements passing a J.NewArray into a vararg `J.MethodI...
  • 1ac5697 Reduce scope of recipe resolvers (#6557)
  • d874f0c Fix MavenRecipeBundleReader to set version on all recipe listings (#6573)
  • 3c3d5c4 Support varargs in JavaTemplate.Matcher (#6556)
  • d8e7061 Python: Enable ty type checking (#6555)
  • 84d2cc7 Maven's DependencyInsight should use LinkedHashMap for stable order (#6568)
  • b2fc70e Small renames and changing bom to pom in tests (#6565)
  • 67cd777 Revert "Fixed situation where a changing a managed dependency that does not h...
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks` from 3.25.0 to 3.26.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks's releases.

3.26.0

What's Changed

  • Transform Assume methods to without a direct counterpart to equivalent Assumptions by @​cortlepp in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#889
  • Apply Kotlin style class reference in AddMockitoExtensionIfAnnotationsUsed by @​Laurens-W in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#890

New Contributors

  • @​cortlepp made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#889

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks/compare/v3.25.0...v3.26.0

Commits
  • 17ef798 Replace getEstimatedEffortPerOccurrence() method with field
  • 49b6e85 Replace getTags() method with field
  • cec049e Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.0
  • ae15942 Use hasModifier instead of getModifiers().stream().anyMatch()
  • 3c16fbc Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields
  • 7150900 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • 2c43283 Apply Kotlin style class reference in AddMockitoExtensionIfAnnotationsUsed ...
  • e9dab31 Transform Assume methods to without a direct counterpart to equivalent `Ass...
  • aefa2b0 Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields
  • 945be5c AssertTrueInstanceofToAssertInstanceOf should handle custom types
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java` from 3.25.0 to 3.26.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java's releases.

3.26.0

What's Changed

  • Also change managed dependency classifier to ehcache to avoid breaking multi module projects by @​dsgrieve in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#963
  • fix IndexOutOfBoundsException that occurs in UseNoArgsConstructor when visiting record compact constructor method by @​zakaria-shahen in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#964
  • Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#966
  • Use var for variables initialized with type casts by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#965
  • Add recipe to find locale-sensitive date/time formatting affected by JDK 20+ CLDR changes by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#967
  • Normalize version numbers in FindJavaVersion by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#969
  • Fix JavaxWebXmlToJakartaWebXml regex to match multiline schemaLocation by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#971

New Contributors

  • @​dsgrieve made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#963

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java/compare/v3.25.0...v3.26.0

Commits
  • 424b525 Fix JavaxWebXmlToJakartaWebXml regex to match multiline schemaLocation (#971)
  • 4beeb8a Normalize version numbers in FindJavaVersion (#969)
  • 1180190 [Auto] SDKMAN! Java candidates as of 2026-01-19T1023
  • 288ea96 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • c7f8d21 Replace getEstimatedEffortPerOccurrence() method with field
  • b22610d Replace getTags() method with field
  • 90b4e63 Add recipe to find locale-sensitive date/time formatting affected by JDK 20+ ...
  • bb9adab Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.0
  • da7c2e1 Replace Arrays.asList with List.of in tests
  • 7a52f88 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis` from 2.25.0 to 2.26.0

  • Replace getEstimatedEffortPerOccurrence() method with field by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#807

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis/compare/v2.25.0...v2.26.0

Commits

  • 7d70265 Replace getTags() method with field (#806)
  • 792ad14 Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.0
  • d642424 Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields (#805)
  • 3960fe8 Use var for variables initialized with type casts
  • 4afa19b Replace getDisplayName() and getDescription() methods with fields

Updates `org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin` from 6.27.1 to 6.28.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin's releases.

6.28.0

What's Changed

  • chore(ci): bump io.micrometer:micrometer-core from 1.16.1 to 1.16.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1098

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin/compare/v6.27.1...v6.28.0

Commits
  • 952bd55 [maven-release-plugin] prepare release v6.28.0
  • 58f498a Bump rewrite.version property
  • 52814b0 chore(ci): bump io.micrometer:micrometer-core from 1.16.1 to 1.16.2 (#1098)
  • 1cadea0 Bump rewrite.version property
  • b64324c [maven-release-plugin] prepare for next development iteration
  • See full diff in compare view

commit_summaries.message:
Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates

Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates:

| Package | From | To |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.71.0` | `8.72.1` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.25.0` | `3.26.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.25.0` | `3.26.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.25.0` | `2.26.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.5.2` | `0.6.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.27.1` | `6.28.0` |
